basic_details.job_title: National H.S.S. Nuapada Guest Faculties Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: National H.S.S. Nuapada Recruitment 2026: National H.S.S. Nuapada is conducting a Walk-in Interview for Guest Faculties posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. Agriculture for Crop Production and BE, B.Tech. in CS/IT or MCA or Master of IT or DOECCA "B Level" certificate.
qualification.details: Guest Faculties in Crop Production: B.Sc. Agriculture with 55% or more Guest Faculties in IT/ITeS Trade: BE, B.Tech. in CS/IT or MCA or Master of IT or DOECCA "B Level" certificate with 55% or more

salary_details.pay_scale: As per guidelines of D.H.S.E., Odisha
salary_details.details: As per guidelines of D.H.S.E., Odisha

_labels.notification_pdf: Download National H.S.S. Nuapada Guest Faculties Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download National H.S.S. Nuapada Guest Faculties Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the National H.S.S. Nuapada recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Guest Faculties. This includes positions for Guest Faculties in Crop Production and Guest Faculties in IT/ITeS Trade.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Guest Faculty position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Guest Faculties posts?
faq.answer: For Guest Faculties in Crop Production, a B.Sc. Agriculture with 55% or more is required. For Guest Faculties in IT/ITeS Trade, a BE, B.Tech. in CS/IT or MCA or Master of IT or DOECCA "B Level" certificate with 55% or more is needed.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 30-06-2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Guest Faculties positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Guest Faculties positions will be as per the guidelines of D.H.S.E., Odisha.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring original and Xerox copies of their educational qualification and experience certificates, along with any other documents specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the National H.S.S. Nuapada located?
faq.answer: National H.S.S. Nuapada is located in Nuapada, Odisha, with the pincode 766105.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Guest Faculties positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these Guest Faculties positions is Contractual.
